title: wolffia delilei
intro: Wolffia delilei is a species of aquatic plant, also known as watermeal, that belongs to the genus Wolffia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Wolffia delilei include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Wolffia delilei is often used as a supplement or added to teas and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
